headings.usage: Used for Drawer Title, Active Mode Status, and massive CTA text.

body.usage: Used for spot descriptions, stats labels, and minor UI text.

mono.usage: Used for earnings numbers, distance metrics (e.g., '1.2 mi').

visual_enhancers.surface_strategy: Crystal Glass variant for the drawer to float elegantly above the map. Needs a 1px top border (border-white/10) to separate from the map background. Internal cards use Tactile Neumorphism with sharp 1px borders.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal ambient shadows, relying heavily on inner borders and glow states for active modes.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use lucide-react (already installed). Phosphor Icons if new needed, but stick to Lucide for consistency.

DutyStationDrawer.layout: Flex column, gap-6, p-6. Top drag handle.
DutyStationDrawer.state_rules: Always mounted but translated off-screen when closed. When open, snaps to bottom.

ModeSelector.description: Segmented control to switch between Live and On-Demand.
ModeSelector.interaction: Smooth sliding highlight background. Disables/hides On-Demand if user role is Hobbyist.
ModeSelector.styling: p-1 bg-zinc-900 rounded-full flex gap-1 border border-white/5.

SpotSelector.layout: Row flex, icon left, text center, distance mono right. Chevron to indicate dropdown/modal.
SpotSelector.styling: p-4 rounded-xl bg-zinc-900 border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all.

ActivationToggle.description: The massive 'Go Live' or 'Activate On-Demand' button.
ActivationToggle.styling: w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg text-white transition-all transform active:scale-[0.98].
ActivationToggle.dynamic_styling: If Live mode: Blue background with blue glow. If On-Demand mode: Amber background with amber glow.

StatsPreview.description: Mini bento grid showing earnings or time online.
StatsPreview.styling: p-4 rounded-xl bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 flex flex-col items-center justify-center.

grids_and_layouts.inner_spacing: px-6 pb-8 pt-4 flex flex-col gap-6

motion.drawer: Framer motion: initial { y: '100%' }, animate { y: 0 }, exit { y: '100%' }, transition { type: 'spring', damping: 25, stiffness: 200 }
motion.toggle: layoutId for the sliding segmented control background.

accessibility.contrast: Text over vibrant buttons must remain white for legibility against Blue-500 or Amber-500.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion via Framer Motion's useReducedMotion hook if necessary.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) carefully: If user.role === 'Hobbyist', the ModeSelector should NOT render the On-Demand option, or the selector itself is hidden entirely and defaults to Live.
Modes are mutually exclusive. Ensure state clears or gracefully transitions when switching between Live and On-Demand.
Use Framer Motion for the drawer slide-up effect and the segmented control active state indicator.
DO NOT use standard HTML <select>. Use Shadcn UI DropdownMenu or a custom bottom-sheet modal for Spot Selection.
Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='mode-live-button', data-testid='activate-duty-button').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grid/flex creatively.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur). DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Always add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
